AI Brief — March 9, 2026

GPT-5RegulationDev Tools

Top Stories

OpenAI Launches GPT-5 Turbo API

The new GPT-5 Turbo model brings 3x faster inference and native tool-use capabilities. Pricing starts at $5/M input tokens — a 40% reduction from GPT-5 base.

Enterprise AI Coding Adoption Hits 60%

A new survey from GitHub reveals that 60% of Fortune 500 companies now use AI coding assistants in production workflows. The most popular use cases: code review, test generation, and documentation.

EU AI Act Enforcement Kicks Off

March 2026 marks the beginning of enforcement for the EU AI Act's high-risk system requirements. Companies face fines up to 7% of global revenue for non-compliance.

Enterprise AI Updates

  • ServiceNow released AI Agents for IT operations, automating incident resolution
  • Palantir launched AIP Agent Studio for custom enterprise AI agent development
  • Stripe integrated AI-powered fraud detection across all payment processing

What to Watch

The race between open-source and proprietary models intensifies as Meta's Llama 4 approaches GPT-5 benchmarks. Key question: will enterprise customers prioritize cost savings from open-source or reliability from closed models?
